<?php return [ /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Password Reset Language Lines |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | The following language lines are the default lines which match reasons | that are given by the password broker for a password update attempt | outcome such as failure due to an invalid password / reset token. | */ 'reset' => 'Your password has been reset.', 'sent' => 'We have emailed your password reset link.', 'throttled' => 'Please wait before retrying.', 'token' => 'This password reset token is invalid.', 'user' => "We can't find a user with that email address.", ];
